class.name: UtilityAIBTCooldownMsec
class.brief_description: Sets a branch of the behaviour tree into a cooldown after it has been ticked for [member cooldown_msec] milliseconds (msec).
class.description: When the cooldown node is ticked, it ticks its child node, starts the cooldown and returns what ever the child node returned. It will return the value of [member cooldown_return_value] until the cooldown expires.

members.member: The cooldown period after the cooldown node is ticked.
The result that is returned during cooldown. Can be either [code]-1[/code]=Failure, [code]0[/code]=Running or [code]1[/code]
